svg.text: Rhema — Real-Time AI Bible Detection Architecture
Tauri v2 (Rust) + React 19 (TypeScript) | Audio → STT → Detection → Display Pipeline
Raw PCM 16 kHz · Mono · cpal device enumeration · user-selected device
Gain normalization · 16 kHz mono PCM stream
Optional feature flag · no cloud needed
Routes partial/final events · SentenceBuffer (120-char max) · Tauri event emission
Emits: transcript_partial · transcript_final · stt_connected · stt_error · stt_speech_started
Deduplication · 2.5s cooldown · Confidence ranking · SermonContext book/chapter boost
FTS5 full-text search · Cross-references · bible.rs commands
Frontend RPC → Rust · audio · stt · detection · bible · broadcast · remote
Rust push → Frontend · audio_level · transcript_* · verse_detections · stt_*
Runtime-loaded via libloading · optional at build time
Rust Crates: rhema-audio · rhema-stt · rhema-detection · rhema-bible · rhema-broadcast · rhema-api
Tauri Commands: audio.rs · stt.rs · detection.rs · bible.rs · broadcast.rs · remote.rs
React Hooks: useAudio · useTranscription · useDetection · useBible · useBroadcast · useRemoteControl
ML Models: Qwen3 0.6B (ONNX/INT8, ~571 MB) · Whisper (optional local) · Sherpa-ONNX (optional)
Rhema v2 · Tauri v2 + React 19 · Real-Time AI Bible Detection for Live Sermon Environments
com.openbezal.rhemaapp · macOS / Windows · rhema-audio · rhema-stt · rhema-detection · rhema-bible · rhema-broadcast · rhema-api
